content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K005
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: 60-Day Check-in
Date: January 6, 2024
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager, West)

James Okafor: Sandra, Darius — happy new year. Two months in, I wanted to hear how the store managers have been finding it.

Sandra Harmon: The feedback has been really positive. The mobile app is getting used constantly. Darius, you've been closest to it — what are you hearing from your stores?

Darius Moore: The managers love that they can pull up the latest procedures on their phones on the floor. We had a compliance visit in December and our store in Fresno had everything up to date because the manager had updated the documents the day before from her phone. That kind of thing would not have happened with our old system.

James Okafor: That's a great story. Any friction points?

Darius Moore: One thing — when multiple managers try to edit the same document at the same time, there's occasionally a conflict that requires manual resolution. It doesn't happen often but when it does it confuses the store managers.

James Okafor: That's a known edge case with simultaneous edits on mobile. I'll flag it with the product team and see if there's a UX improvement in the works. It's come up a couple of times before.

Sandra Harmon: Overall we're happy. James, I want to start the conversation about the distribution center. We've got about 18 people there who could benefit from this.

James Okafor: Let's do it. I'll put together a proposal for adding them at the renewal in November — or sooner if you want to move ahead before then.

Sandra Harmon: November works. Let's keep it clean at renewal time.
